news.title: These Japanese AI winners don’t make chips. They make toilets, glass fiber and seasoning
news.summary: A toilet maker, a glass fiber manufacturer and the maker of MSG have in Japan have become major beneficiaries of the AI boom.

news.title: $100M New Jersey deli fraudster James Patten sentenced to 21 months in prison
news.summary: The notorious New Jersey deli fraud case led to losses of more than $5 million for victims that included two U.S. universities.

news.title: Mamdani says New York lacks authority to arrest Netanyahu, calls him ‘war criminal’
news.summary: Israel's prime minister, Benjamin Netanyahu, is the target of an arrest warrant issued by the International Criminal Court related to the war on Gaza.

news.title: Trump plans steep tariffs on generic drugs starting in 2028 to spur U.S. production
news.summary: The phased schedule is intended to push generic drugmakers to move production onshore.

news.title: Japan exports and imports grow at fastest pace in June since November 2022, beating estimates
news.summary: Exports climbed 19.3%, while imports spiked 25.4% compared to June last year.

news.title: Super Micro’s stock soars as its margins unexpectedly double
news.summary: The AI server maker now expects gross margins to be in the range of 15% to 17% thanks to an improving customer and product mix

news.title: Sony’s 'ironic' PlayStation disc decision upends gamer conventions and threatens a $7 billion resale market
news.summary: In 2013, Sony tweaked Xbox by showing how easy it was to share a PlayStation disc. Now, gamers say Sony has become exactly what it mocked.

news.title: Wall Street can wait: Why one U.S. biotech firm is listing in Hong Kong first
news.summary: Global biotech firms are increasingly being drawn to Hong Kong for its growing investor base and proximity to Chinese pharmaceutical partners.

news.title: Your SPLG Position Is Stretched, What's Next?
news.summary: The large-cap fund's price is well above its trend, but the advance was narrow, raising a tough question for holders.

news.title: Nike to cut off thousands of online distributors in China, restructure digital footprint
news.summary: Nike is streamlining its online business in China as the company looks to stabilize pricing and branding and get back to growth.

news.title: This is the ideal retirement strategy if you want to keep your healthcare costs down

news.title: The world's top fintech companies: 2026
news.summary: Fintech is entering an era of scale and maturity, just as AI forces innovation. CNBC and Statista name the key players shaping the industry — and shaking it up.

news.title: JPMorgan's Jamie Dimon made bearish call on treasury bond market. Many investors already acted on it
news.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon warned this week long-term treasuries are not a good buy, even if stocks fall. Many investors already acted on that message this year.

news.title: Prediction markets and their opponents are spending more to influence Congress in 2026

news.title: The Fed rang the alarm about Anthropic's Mythos AI model — but had to go months without it
news.summary: The central bank didn't have access to Claude Mythos Preview as of mid-July, even as other institutions were racing to patch their vulnerabilities.

news.title: Is This the Most Undervalued Sector ETF on the Market?

news.title: What Are You Really Paying For Inside VOO?

news.title: RFK Jr. says cyclospora outbreak is 'under control'
